MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SIOBHAN O'BOYLE's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Grant as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: John M. True; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/JMT)
